title: The King in Yellow
description:
An important early classic of fantasy/sci-fi.  [Main story:] The ill effects of a soul-destroying play, to read which brings doom.  A discovery that changes living flesh to stone.  The mad adherents of a cult of evil powers from beyond. A lost traveler is suddenly 400 years in the past.
Great writing; powerful emotions. Chambers wrote mainly conventional stuff, but not here.
